rule: Always enforce JWT token authentication and expiration limits on protected endpoints.
Always validate inputs using Pydantic v2 schemas and sanitize request payloads.
Always parameterize SQL queries to prevent SQL injection vulnerabilities.
Always restrict CORS headers to explicit trusted origin domains.
Always include pagination parameters (limit & offset) on database list queries.
Always cache expensive API endpoints using Redis or LRU memory caches.
Always write automated unit tests for core backend services and route controllers.
Always generate Docker multi-stage build files with a non-root appuser.
Always enforce Pydantic v2 schemas and input sanitization headers.
